---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a capability for Desktop Frame
title: "feat: <short summary>"
labels: [enhancement, needs-triage]
assignees: []
---

<!--
A feature request is a starting point, not a commitment. Accepted requests become
Feature Tracker entries in Notion and are specified per
Documentation/Templates/FeatureSpecification.md.
-->

## Problem

What are you trying to do that Desktop Frame does not let you do today? Describe the situation, not a solution.

## Who this is for

Which kind of user this helps (developer, trader, creator, student, designer, or other) and how often they would use it.

## Proposed idea

Optionally, how you imagine it working. We may take a different approach.

## Alternatives

What you do today instead, and why it falls short.

## Anything else

Context, examples, or references.
